findings.message: Mutation input parameter 'description' is accepted but never used. The resolver accepts 'description: str' on line 37 but doesn't pass it to repository.create_item(), which only accepts (session, name). This misleads clients into thinking the description will be persisted.
findings.suggestion: Either (1) remove the 'description' parameter from the mutation signature if it's not needed, (2) add description support to the Item model and repository.create_item(), or (3) explicitly validate and document that description is silently ignored.
